CustomField.description: The Opportunity Stage name to automatically apply when all Payments for an Opportunity are marked as Paid (Payment Amount Received equals Opportunity Amount). Must match an existing Opportunity Stage picklist value, typically a Closed/Won stage. Leave blank to disable automatic Stage updates when payments are complete.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Opportunity Stage to set automatically when all Payments are received. Leave blank to disable automatic stage changes on full payment.
CustomField.label: Opportunity Stage for When Fully Paid
